steps.title: Set up the cost formula
steps.content:
Elena pays 25 dollars as an initial fee, plus 0.80 dollars for each mile driven. For 32 miles, the total cost is:
$$\text{Total Cost} = 25 + 0.80 \times 32$$

steps.title: Calculate the total amount
steps.content:
Multiply the per-mile rate by the number of miles:
$$0.80 \times 32 = 25.6$$
Add this to the initial fee:
$$25 + 25.6 = 50.60$$
The total amount charged is 50.60 dollars. That matches Choice A — \$50.60.
